creator: Axel.Rau@Chaos1.DE
text:
It turned out, that the bug happens with the DIAMEX programmer, not the USBasp, which has unrelated issues with my ATTiny application.
  www.diamex.de
The programming job completes successfully with the DIAMEX programmer despite the "stalled" error. See attached dump.

From my point of view, this report can be closed.
